resposta:
solution: ```
class Solution:
    def minEnd(self, n: int, x: int) -> int:
        m = n - 1
        res = x
        bit = 1
        while m:
            if (x & bit) == 0:
                res |= (m & 1) * bit
                m >>= 1
            bit <<= 1
        return res
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n) + log(x))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Treat the strictly increasing sequence as x OR k for k = 0 … n-1, where k only sets bits that are 0 in x. The smallest last element is x OR (n-1) after spreading the bits of n-1 into the zero positions of x.
